subject: AI Product Line Progress Weekly Report - Week 12
body:
Dear CEO,

AI product line progress this week:
- Recommendation engine core algorithm complete, accuracy reached 92%
- Frontend interaction prototype first version complete
- Issue encountered: insufficient GPU resources, training tasks queued heavily, affecting model iteration speed
- M2 (MVP) expected to finish on time, but GPU resource issue needs urgent resolution

Risk items:
- GPU server procurement approval still pending (waiting 2 weeks)
- Frontend developer understaffed, Fang Wang simultaneously handling payment module refactoring

Wei Chen

subject: International Expansion Research Progress - Delay Notice
body:
Dear CEO,

The international market research (M1) is expected to be delayed by 2 weeks, originally planned for March 31 completion, now estimated for April 14.

Reasons for delay:
- Southeast Asian market complexity exceeded expectations, additional research needed for Vietnam and Philippines markets
- Translation and localization assessment requires more time
- Research team understaffed (only 2 people)

Impact on subsequent phases: M2 (localization team setup) may correspondingly shift to mid-June.

Suggestion: Could we focus on Singapore and Indonesia first, narrowing scope to accelerate progress?

Na Liu

subject: Operational Efficiency Project - Automation Tool Procurement Request
body:
Dear CEO,

Operational efficiency initiative M2 progress:
- CI/CD automation pipeline setup complete (saving 30% of development deployment time)
- Currently evaluating RPA tools for finance and HR process automation
- Need to purchase UiPath enterprise license, budget approximately 120,000 yuan/year

Expected impact: financial month-end close process reduced from 5 days to 2 days, HR onboarding process reduced from 3 days to 1 day.

M2 overall progress is good, expected to finish early by mid-May.

Lei Zhang
